accepted_risks: Reviewer is the same agent as the extractor; independent re-review is recommended before the skill is switched to active.
Only single-channel text extraction was performed; rendered-page dual pass was not completed by an independent reviewer.
Document is 228 pages; Unit Guides section (p.21-133) was sampled rather than fully audited page-by-page.
Official URL and exact retrieved_at are not verified in local archive metadata.
Page references use printed/footer page numbers, which are offset from physical PDF pages due to front matter and blank pages.

findings.issue: Unit Guides section was sampled (Unit 1 and fragments of Units 2 and 5); full learning-objective / essential-knowledge lists for Units 2-8 were not extracted.
findings.required_fix: Builder should treat Unit Guides as the authoritative topic source and, if needed, re-sample specific units before finalising topics.json.

findings.issue: Exam overview, FRQ types, task verbs, and skill weightings were extracted; full sample exam questions were not included.
findings.required_fix: No fix required for source bundle; builder should use exam info for assessment.json and not copy sample questions.
